title: More Nonsense Limerick 82
content:
There was an old person of Crowle,
    Who lived in the nest of an owl;
    When they screamed in the nest, 
    He screamed out with the rest,
    That depressing old person of Crowle.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 82"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
